note: Master catalog of papers referenced in the field guide. `key` is the canonical file/dir name for distributed sources. `ref` is the entry number in the guide. Status lifecycle: pending -> downloaded -> converted; restricted marks a consulted primary source whose PDF and full-text derivatives are kept outside the repository; other terminal states include unavailable and download_failed. `verify` is a lowercase phrase expected in the first pages of the PDF (sanity check against grabbing the wrong paper). New and refreshed entries pin `source_version`, `source_checked`, and `pdf_retrieved_at`; older entries retain their original PDF provenance and hash.
